title: Rajasthan Minister's Shocking Remark Sparks Outrage After Maternal Deaths In Bikaner | News18
description: | "Did pregnant woman come on foot or dancing?" Rajasthan Minister Gajendra Singh Khimsar makes shocking remark when confronted over deaths of 5 women due to kidney failure after childbirths in BikanerA major political controversy has erupted in Rajasthan after Health Minister Gajendra Singh Khimsar made a controversial remark while responding to questions about the deaths of women reportedly linked to complications following childbirth in Bikaner.The comment has sparked sharp criticism from opp
